note: The official syllabus applies to students admitted in 2025-26 and thereafter. Recommended Year values are included only where the official five-year structure identifies the requirement: language enhancement, specialised electives, professional practica, and the project. The remaining Professional Core courses stay unassigned because their course-code levels are not used to infer a Year. The three Professional Practicum courses are the official 66-credit capstone experience but use the internship course type to preserve their teaching-practice character; BECE5999 is the separate Project requirement and remains core. The seven specialised electives form a closed published pool, although the Faculty states that not all will be offered every year. CC##XXXX, AILTXXXX, non-credit national education and national security requirements, and any other unspecified non-credit courses are excluded because they do not identify coded courses.
